chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1384 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 3 a/w reply as at A. 2. For hearing of CMA No.8799/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 09.12.2025. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Mastoi, AAG a/w SIP Nizamullah PS Ferozabad East Karachi ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner through instant petition seeks following relief:- “A) TO DIRECT the officials Respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and to entertain the petitioner's complaint, B) TO DIRECT the Inspector General of police Sindh and other relevant of officials to ensure full protection and security of the petitioner from any kind of harassment, threats, or coercion; C) TO DECLARE that harassment of the petitioner by the Respondent No.8 to 14 and other unknown persons are illegal, malafide and unconstitutional; D) RESTRAINING ORDER; Restrain the Respondent No.8 to 14 from harassing, threating or serious kill of petitioner, and taking any coercive action against the petitioner in any manner whatsoever, E) Any other relief or relief(s) which this Honourable Court, may deem, fit and proper under the circumstances of the Petition.” Pursuant to court notices official respondents have filed their comments, which are taken on record, wherein it is undertaken that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Learned AAG submits that in terms of prayer clause official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner.

Pervaiz Ahmed Mastoi, AAG a/w SIP Nizamullah PS Ferozabad East Karachi ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner through instant petition seeks following relief:- “A) TO DIRECT the officials Respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and to entertain the petitioner's complaint, B) TO DIRECT the Inspector General of police Sindh and other relevant of officials to ensure full protection and security of the petitioner from any kind of harassment, threats, or coercion; C) TO DECLARE that harassment of the petitioner by the Respondent No.8 to 14 and other unknown persons are illegal, malafide and unconstitutional; D) RESTRAINING ORDER; Restrain the Respondent No.8 to 14 from harassing, threating or serious kill of petitioner, and taking any coercive action against the petitioner in any manner whatsoever, E) Any other relief or relief(s) which this Honourable Court, may deem, fit and proper under the circumstances of the Petition.” Pursuant to court notices official respondents have filed their comments, which are taken on record, wherein it is undertaken that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Learned AAG submits that in terms of prayer clause official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, therefore, in view of the reply filed by the official respondents and statement made by learned AAG, this petition is disposed of. Order accordingly. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s), if any. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP concerned for compliance. JUDGE Nadir*
